title: urophyllum macrophyllum
intro: Urophyllum macrophyllum, also known as the large-leaf urophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Urophyllum macrophyllum are commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
